finding.fact: Asked "luxury hotels London" 2 times, an AI engine named you in 0 of 2 answers; it named Claridge's (2/2).
finding.layman_explanation: AI answers vary run to run, so we asked 2 times (via nvidia-nim). You were never named, while Claridge's appeared 2 of 2. The firms named every time are the ones AI now treats as the default answer for your buyers, compounding while you are absent.
finding.tamazia_fix_short: Tamazia builds the entity, content and authority signals that get you named consistently when buyers ask AI for a provider like you.
